source_recall.pass: find >= 30% of ground truth orgs OR find >= 2 orgs with CLL-specific specimens
source_recall.notes: Pipeline may also surface 100K Genomes Project CLL cohort or Danish CLL study — those are data access cohorts, NOT physical specimen re-access. Pipeline must distinguish data access from specimen procurement. Academic hematology centers (Mayo, MD Anderson) are valid finds if they offer biospecimen requests.

checks: every [documented] claim has verbatim quote + source ID
specimen counts cite a source, never estimated from training data

pillar_coverage_per_source.pass: mean >= 40% of available fields filled per source

checks: every claim carries one of the 4 labels
every [verified]/[unverified] cites the [documented] facts it's based on
hypotheses state what verification was attempted

ProteoGenex.note: Established commercial provider — good contact, IGHV status unlikely tracked

France Tissue Bank.note: Commercial tissue bank — limited clinical annotation, IGHV status unknown

CHTN Eastern.note: Academic tissue network with hematology focus — best chance for clinical annotation depth

Ukraine Research Group.note: Procurement group — limited published literature presence, IGHV tracking unknown

BIOMEDICA CRO.note: Procurement CRO — good contact, weak collection protocol documentation

score_calibration.pass: mean absolute error <= 1.0 per criterion vs expected range

must_flag_as_unknown.reason: IGHV mutation status not tracked in any biospecimen registry — requires molecular testing or clinical records
Treatment-naive CLL enrolled in clinical trials, not commercial biobanks — structural scarcity
PBMC viability depends on cryopreservation protocol — not tracked in AminoChain data
100K Genomes CLL and Danish CLL cohorts are data-access only — physical specimen re-access is a separate gate
not in any public registry — requires direct inquiry

gap_honesty.fail: < 30% flagged (system presents incomplete picture as complete)

aminochain_orgs_with_cll.France Tissue Bank: IGHV status and treatment-naive flag unknown
aminochain_orgs_with_cll.ProteoGenex: IGHV status and treatment-naive flag unknown
aminochain_orgs_with_cll.CHTN Eastern: IGHV status and treatment-naive flag unknown
aminochain_orgs_with_cll.Ukraine Research Group: IGHV status and treatment-naive flag unknown
aminochain_orgs_with_cll.BIOMEDICA CRO: IGHV status and treatment-naive flag unknown

ground_truth_overlap.pass: at least 1 recommended source overlaps with AminoChain orgs OR surfaces a credible academic hematology biobank with CLL specimen access

checks: no invented IGHV mutation status without a molecular testing source
no invented treatment-naive flags without clinical record citation
no invented PBMC viability claims without cryopreservation protocol citation
no conflation of data-access cohorts with physical specimen procurement
no invented contacts — every email traces to paper/website/registry
